name: ExtensionAllergyIntolerance_Participant
title: R5: Who or what participated in the activities related to the allergy or intolerance and how they were involved (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `AllergyIntolerance.participant` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`AllergyIntolerance.participant` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `AllergyIntolerance.participant` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `AllergyIntolerance.participant` has a context of AllergyIntolerance based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `AllergyIntolerance`.
Element `AllergyIntolerance.participant` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
